widgetData.source_sentence: [Admin] \"Unable to create asset\" error when creating asset from All Assets pageNavigate to Assets > All Assets and click the Create button to open the Create Asset UI. After filling in all required fields and clicking the Create button, the system throws an error message stating \"Unable to create asset\" instead of successfully creating the asset.
sentences:
[Admin] Permission denied / Failed to open stream error when submitting Manual Product InboundNavigate to Manage Assets > Manage Products > Products Inbound and select Manual Inbound. Click Create Inbound to open the Product Inbound UI. In the Scan or Search Barcode section, enter a barcode and fill in all required fields. After clicking the Submit button, the system throws an error instead of creating the inbound record successfully.
 
 Observed Error:
 The stream or file "/home/assets.wecomm.info/public_html/storage/logs/activity/laravel-2024-10-01.log" could not be opened in append mode: Failed to open stream: Permission denied

[User Portal] DataTables warning displayed when opening Create Work Order screenLogin as a user and navigate to Work Orders > Manage. Click on the Create Work Order button to open the Create Work Order screen. While loading the page, the system displays a DataTables warning / Ajax error popup message.
 
 Observed Error:
 DataTables warning: table id=DataTables_Table_8 - Ajax error.

Pickup Product Invoice - Inconsistent Date Formats DisplayedIn the Pickup Product Invoice, the date formats are inconsistent across different fields. The Requisition Date and Pickup Date are displayed in different formats on the same invoice, causing formatting inconsistency and poor user experience.

widgetData.source_sentence: Values Reset to Zero in Product Location on EDIT PRODUCT Page For New ProductValues for InStock, Min Qty, and Max Qty reset to zero after updating and refreshing the EDIT PRODUCT page.
sentences:
[Admin] Permission denied / Failed to open stream error when saving Work Order ProcedureNavigate to Work Order > Order Procedure to open the Create Work Order Procedure UI. After filling in all required fields and clicking the Save button, the system throws an error instead of saving the Work Order Procedure successfully.
 
 Observed Error:
 The stream or file "/home/assets.wecomm.info/public_html/storage/logs/activity/laravel-2024-10-01.log" could not be opened in append mode: Failed to open stream: Permission denied

[Admin] Permission denied / Failed to open stream error when saving Work Order ProcedureNavigate to Work Order > Order Procedure to open the Create Work Order Procedure UI. After filling in all required fields and clicking the Save button, the system throws an error instead of saving the Work Order Procedure successfully.
 
 Observed Error:
 The stream or file "/home/assets.wecomm.info/public_html/storage/logs/activity/laravel-2024-10-01.log" could not be opened in append mode: Failed to open stream: Permission denied

Quantity field in Cart Items is not manually editableNavigate to the Demo WeComm > Point of Sale UI and add any product to the cart.\nIn the Cart Items section, the QTY field cannot be manually edited. Users can only increase or decrease quantity using the + / - buttons.\nThis creates a poor user experience for larger quantity changes. For example, to add 10 more items, the user must click the + button 10 times.

widgetData.source_sentence:
[Admin] Permission denied / Failed to open stream error when saving Work Order ProcedureNavigate to Work Order > Order Procedure to open the Create Work Order Procedure UI. After filling in all required fields and clicking the Save button, the system throws an error instead of saving the Work Order Procedure successfully.
 
 Observed Error:
 The stream or file "/home/assets.wecomm.info/public_html/storage/logs/activity/laravel-2024-10-01.log" could not be opened in append mode: Failed to open stream: Permission denied
sentences: Unable to create ticket after submitting Create Ticket formWhen logged in as a User and navigating to Service Desk > Tickets, the user can open the Create Ticket UI and fill all mandatory fields. However, after clicking the Save button, the system displays an error message:\nUnable to create ticket.

Accounting Template Column Displays Incorrect/Random DataWhen navigating to Reports > Customer Orders and opening the Customer Order Details report, the Accounting Template column is displaying random or irrelevant text instead of the actual accounting template associated with the order.

[Admin] \"Unable to create work order type\" error when saving Create Work Order TypeNavigate to Work Order > Order Types to open the Work Order Types UI. Click the Create button to open the Create Work Order Type form. After filling in all required fields and clicking the Save button, the system throws an error message stating \"Unable to create work order type.\" instead of saving successfully.

widgetData.source_sentence: Unable to create ticket after submitting Create Ticket formWhen logged in as a User and navigating to Service Desk > Tickets, the user can open the Create Ticket UI and fill all mandatory fields. However, after clicking the Save button, the system displays an error message:\nUnable to create ticket.
sentences: [Admin] Available product quantity not updated after adding stock at product locationAs an Admin, create a product and update the Product Location with stock levels. Even though the selected location shows the product as In Stock, the Available Quantity field does not get updated and remains incorrect.

[Admin] \"Failed to open stream\" error when saving Create Work Order from Asset details pageLogin as an Admin and navigate to Asset > All Assets. Select any asset under the Name column to open the Asset Details page. Click the Action button and choose Create Work Order. After filling all required fields and clicking Save, the system throws an error message: \"Failed to open stream\" instead of creating the work order successfully.

System allows counted quantity higher than available stock during cycle countWhile performing a Cycle Count, the system allows users to enter a counted stock quantity that is greater than the available stock for an item.\nThis creates inventory inconsistency and can incorrectly inflate stock totals after cycle count completion.

widgetData.source_sentence:
Order shows success message but not created when assignee has no assigned warehousen Demo WeComm, while placing a POS Order, select Mary Yed as the Assignee in the Enter Warehouse Pick Details popup.
After submission, the system displays:
Order placed successfully
Error message: User doesn't have assigned Warehouse
This is contradictory behavior. Even though a success message is shown, the POS order/order number cannot be found in Customer Orders > Manage Customer Orders.
sentences: POS order allows quantity greater than available stock and marks order as deliveredIn Demo WeComm, under Manage Products, the product Viktos Taculus MX Chest Rig Bag shows available stock as 2.\nHowever, the system allows creation of a POS Order for 3 units of the same product without showing any validation or out-of-stock error. The order is then processed and marked as Delivered.\nThis indicates inventory validation is not enforced during POS order placement.

Incorrect order number displayed and wrong delivery status message shown in notificationsNavigate to Warehouse > Orders > Customer Orders and open the Notifications panel.
Two issues are observed in order notifications:
Notification order number does not match the actual order number shown in the Customer Orders grid.
After the product/order status is marked as Delivered, the notification message still says "Ready for shipping" instead of confirming delivery.
This causes confusion for users regarding actual order references and shipment status.

[Admin/User Portal] Newly created asset not visible in Request Assets UIWhen a new asset is created, it is not displayed in the Request Assets UI under the available assets list. The asset should become available immediately after successful creation, but it does not appear even after refreshing the page.
